name: @borjie/translation-sota
description: Translation SOTA (Wave 19I) — bidirectional EN<->SW translation runner that preserves mining / regulatory / financial terminology (deterministic glossary lock), code-switched segments (language-ID segmenter), register / formality, and Tanzanian honorifics. 3-tier provider strategy (Claude Opus 4.7 / Gemini 2.5 Pro / NLLB-200 self-host). BLEU + chrF + COMET + terminology-adherence evaluation. See Docs/DESIGN/TRANSLATION_SOTA_SPEC.md.
